title: cremanthodium oblongatum
intro: Cremanthodium oblongatum, also known as the golden ragwort, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. The medicinal properties of Cremanthodium oblongatum are attributed to its leaves and flowers, which contain flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. This plant is said to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system. Cremanthodium oblongatum is typically prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and its medicinal uses have been documented in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries.
